mapper.select: select count(*) from signup where id = #{id} and status in ('PENDING','APPROVED')

select count(*) as TOTAL, count(case when status = 'PENDING' then 1 end) as PENDING, count(case when status = 'APPROVED' then 1 end) as APPROVED, count(case when status = 'REJECTED' then 1 end) as REJECTED from signup
mapper.update: update signup set status = 'APPROVED' where signup_seq = #{signup_seq}
